todos.content: Read and understand parity_external_soak.go and parity.go
Fix GET /rest/db/completion required keys
Fix GET /rest/db/browse to not require object wrapper keys
Fix GET /rest/system/status required keys
Fix POST /rest/db/scan to not require 'ok' key
Fix pending devices/folders to avoid count hard requirement
Enforce required key presence during probing in parity_external_soak.go
Ensure daemon-api-surface scenario is external soak repetition candidate
Run tests and summarize

00133| 	case externalMultiFolderScenarioID:

00140| 		return runScenarioExternalCrashRecovery(impl, seed)

00508| type daemonProc struct {
00509| 	cmd    *exec.Cmd
00510| 	stderr bytes.Buffer
00511| 	waited bool
00512| }
00513| 
00514| func (p *daemonProc) start() error {
00515| 	p.cmd.Stdout = &p.stderr
00516| 	p.cmd.Stderr = &p.stderr
00517| 	return p.cmd.Start()
00518| }
00519| 
00520| func (p *daemonProc) stop() error {
00521| 	if p == nil || p.cmd == nil || p.cmd.Process == nil {
00522| 		return nil
00523| 	}
00524| 	if p.waited {
00525| 		return nil
00526| 	}
00527| 	_ = p.cmd.Process.Kill()
00528| 	waitCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 2*time.Second)
00529| 	defer cancel()
00530| 	err := waitWithContext(waitCtx, p.cmd)
00531| 	if err == nil || strings.Contains(err.Error(), "Wait was already called") {
00532| 		p.waited = true
00533| 		return nil
00534| 	}
00535| 	return err
00536| }

00538| func (p *daemonProc) crashKill() error {
00539| 	if p == nil || p.cmd == nil || p.cmd.Process == nil {
00540| 		return nil
00541| 	}
00542| 	if p.waited {
00543| 		return nil
00544| 	}
00545| 	if err := p.cmd.Process.Kill(); err != nil && !errors.Is(err, os.ErrProcessDone) {
00546| 		return err
00547| 	}
00548| 	waitCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 5*time.Second)
00549| 	defer cancel()
00550| 	err := waitWithContext(waitCtx, p.cmd)
00551| 	if err == nil {
00552| 		p.waited = true
00553| 		return nil
00554| 	}
00555| 	// `go run`/`cargo run` wrappers can return deadline/signal errors while still
00556| 	// ensuring abrupt process termination semantics for crash-recovery testing.
00557| 	if errors.Is(err, context.DeadlineExceeded) || strings.Contains(err.Error(), "signal: killed") {
00558| 		p.waited = true
00559| 		return nil
00560| 	}
00561| 	return err
00562| }
00563| 
00564| func (p *daemonProc) wait(timeout time.Duration) error {
00565| 	if p == nil || p.cmd == nil {
00566| 		return nil
00567| 	}
00568| 	if p.waited {
00569| 		return nil
00570| 	}
00571| 	waitCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), timeout)
00572| 	defer cancel()
00573| 	err := waitWithContext(waitCtx, p.cmd)
00574| 	if err == nil || strings.Contains(err.Error(), "Wait was already called") {
00575| 		p.waited = true
00576| 		return nil
00577| 	}
00578| 	return err
00579| }

00769| func probeDaemonAPIEndpoints(baseURL, apiKey, folderID, deviceID string) ([]string, map[string]any, error) {
00770| 	requiredEndpoints, err := loadRequiredAPIEndpointsForProbe()
00771| 	if err != nil {
00772| 		return nil, nil, err
00773| 	}
00774| 	if len(requiredEndpoints) == 0 {
00775| 		return nil, nil, errors.New("required api endpoints list is empty")
00776| 	}
00777| 
00778| 	covered := make([]string, 0, len(requiredEndpoints))
00779| 	assertions := make(map[string]any, len(requiredEndpoints))
00780| 	nonShutdown := make([]string, 0, len(requiredEndpoints))
00781| 	hasShutdown := false
00782| 	for _, endpoint := range requiredEndpoints {
00783| 		if endpoint == "POST /rest/system/shutdown" {
00784| 			hasShutdown = true
00785| 			continue
00786| 		}
00787| 		nonShutdown = append(nonShutdown, endpoint)
00788| 	}
00789| 
00790| 	for _, endpoint := range nonShutdown {
00791| 		method, target, err := apiProbeTarget(baseURL, endpoint, folderID, deviceID)
00792| 		if err != nil {
00793| 			return nil, nil, err
00794| 		}
00795| 		payload, statusCode, err := requestJSONAny(method, target, apiKey)
00796| 		if err != nil {
00797| 			return nil, nil, fmt.Errorf("%s probe failed: %w", endpoint, err)
00798| 		}
00799| 		responseKind, presentKeys := apiProbeResponseShape(payload)
00800| 		requiredKeys := requiredAPIResponseKeysForProbe(endpoint)
00801| 		assertions[endpoint] = map[string]any{
00802| 			"status_code":   statusCode,
00803| 			"response_kind": responseKind,
00804| 			"required_keys": requiredKeys,
00805| 			"present_keys":  presentKeys,
00806| 		}
00807| 		covered = append(covered, endpoint)
00808| 	}
00809| 
00810| 	if hasShutdown {
00811| 		method, target, err := apiProbeTarget(baseURL, "POST /rest/system/shutdown", folderID, deviceID)
00812| 		if err != nil {
00813| 			return nil, nil, err
00814| 		}
00815| 		payload, statusCode, err := requestJSONAny(method, target, apiKey)
00816| 		if err != nil {
00817| 			return nil, nil, fmt.Errorf("POST /rest/system/shutdown probe failed: %w", err)
00818| 		}
00819| 		responseKind, presentKeys := apiProbeResponseShape(payload)
00820| 		assertions["POST /rest/system/shutdown"] = map[string]any{
00821| 			"status_code":   statusCode,
00822| 			"response_kind": responseKind,
00823| 			"required_keys": requiredAPIResponseKeysForProbe("POST /rest/system/shutdown"),
00824| 			"present_keys":  presentKeys,
00825| 		}
00826| 		covered = append(covered, "POST /rest/system/shutdown")
00827| 	}
00828| 
00829| 	sort.Strings(covered)
00830| 	return covered, assertions, nil
00831| }

00833| func loadRequiredAPIEndpointsForProbe() ([]string, error) {
00834| 	gatesPath := strings.TrimSpace(os.Getenv("PARITY_REPLACEMENT_GATES_PATH"))
00835| 	if gatesPath == "" {
00836| 		gatesPath = "parity/replacement-gates.json"
00837| 	}
00838| 	bs, err := os.ReadFile(gatesPath)
00839| 	if err != nil {
00840| 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("read replacement gates: %w", err)
00841| 	}
00842| 	var cfg replacementGateConfig
00843| 	if err := json.Unmarshal(bs, &cfg); err != nil {
00844| 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("decode replacement gates: %w", err)
00845| 	}
00846| 	return dedupeSortedNonEmpty(cfg.RequiredAPIEndpoints), nil
00847| }

00896| 	case "POST /rest/db/scan":

00898| 	case "POST /rest/db/override":

00902| 	case "POST /rest/system/shutdown":

00904| 	default:

00909| func requiredAPIResponseKeysForProbe(endpoint string) []string {
00910| 	switch endpoint {
00911| 	case "GET /rest/system/version":
00912| 		return []string{"version", "longVersion", "os", "arch"}
00913| 	case "GET /rest/system/status":
00914| 		return []string{"myID", "uptimeS"}
00915| 	case "GET /rest/system/connections":
00916| 		return []string{"total", "connections"}
00917| 	case "GET /rest/db/status":
00918| 		return []string{"folder", "state", "localFiles", "needFiles"}
00919| 	case "GET /rest/db/completion":
00920| 		return []string{"folder", "device", "completionPct", "needBytes"}
00921| 	case "GET /rest/db/file":
00922| 		return []string{"folder", "file"}
00923| 	case "GET /rest/db/ignores":
00924| 		return []string{"ignore"}
00925| 	case "GET /rest/db/localchanged":
00926| 		return []string{"page", "perpage"}
00927| 	case "GET /rest/db/need":
00928| 		return []string{"page", "perpage"}
00929| 	case "GET /rest/db/remoteneed":
00930| 		return []string{"page", "perpage"}
00931| 	case "GET /rest/db/browse":
00932| 		return []string{"0"}
00933| 	case "POST /rest/db/scan":
00934| 		return []string{"ok"}
00935| 	case "GET /rest/cluster/pending/devices":
00936| 		return []string{"count"}
00937| 	case "GET /rest/cluster/pending/folders":
00938| 		return []string{"count"}
00939| 	case "GET /rest/config":
00940| 		return []string{"folders", "devices"}
00941| 	default:
00942| 		return []string{}
00943| 	}
00944| }

00946| func apiProbeResponseShape(payload any) (string, []string) {
00947| 	switch typed := payload.(type) {
00948| 	case map[string]any:
00949| 		keys := make([]string, 0, len(typed))
00950| 		for key := range typed {
00951| 			keys = append(keys, key)
00952| 		}
00953| 		sort.Strings(keys)
00954| 		return "object", keys
00955| 	case []any:
00956| 		return "array", []string{}
00957| 	case nil:
00958| 		return "null", []string{}
00959| 	default:
00960| 		return "scalar", []string{}
00961| 	}
00962| }

00549| 		}
00550| 		for sym := range publicRustSymbols {
00551| 			if _, ok := mappedRustSymbols[sym]; !ok {
00552| 				if !exceptionAllowed(exceptions.Items, "rust-surface-unmapped", "", sym) {
00553| 					report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
00554| 						Rule:    "rust-surface-unmapped",
00555| 						Path:    sym,
00556| 						Message: "rust public symbol has no mapping entry",
00557| 					})
00558| 				}
00559| 			}
00560| 		}
00561| 	}
00562| 
00563| 	scanTODOFixme(&report, exceptions.Items)
00564| 	enforceDiffReports(&report, *mode)
00565| 
00566| 	if *mode == "release" || *mode == "replacement" {
00567| 		if report.Summary.TotalFeatures == 0 || report.Summary.ParityVerified != report.Summary.TotalFeatures {
00568| 			report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
00569| 				Rule:    "release-gate",
00570| 				Message: fmt.Sprintf("%s mode requires 100%% parity-verified: have %d/%d", *mode, report.Summary.ParityVerified, report.Summary.TotalFeatures),
00571| 			})
00572| 		}
00573| 	}
00574| 
00575| 	report.Summary.Failures = len(report.Failures)
00576| 
00577| 	if err := writeJSON(*reportPath, report); err != nil {
00578| 		fatalf("write report: %v", err)
00579| 	}
00580| 
00581| 	if len(report.Failures) > 0 {
00582| 		os.Exit(1)
00583| 	}
00584| }

00586| func runDashboard(args []string) {
00587| 	fs := flag.NewFlagSet("dashboard", flag.ExitOnError)
00588| 	manifestPath := fs.String("manifest", "parity/feature-manifest.json", "manifest input path")
00589| 	mappingPath := fs.String("mapping", "parity/mapping-rust.json", "mapping input path")
00590| 	outJSON := fs.String("json", "parity/dashboard.json", "dashboard json path")
00591| 	outMD := fs.String("markdown", "parity/dashboard.md", "dashboard markdown path")
00592| 	if err := fs.Parse(args); err != nil {
00593| 		fatalf("parse flags: %v", err)
00594| 	}
00595| 
00596| 	manifest, err := readManifest(*manifestPath)
00597| 	if err != nil {
00598| 		fatalf("read manifest: %v", err)
00599| 	}
00600| 	mapping, err := readMapping(*mappingPath)
00601| 	if err != nil {
00602| 		fatalf("read mapping: %v", err)
00603| 	}
00604| 
00605| 	mappingByID := make(map[string]mappingItem, len(mapping.Items))
00606| 	for _, it := range mapping.Items {
00607| 		mappingByID[it.ID] = it
00608| 	}
00609| 
00610| 	totals := reportSummary{TotalFeatures: len(manifest.Items)}
00611| 	bySubsystem := make(map[string]*dashboardSection)
00612| 
00613| 	for _, feat := range manifest.Items {
00614| 		mi := mappingByID[feat.ID]
00615| 		section, ok := bySubsystem[feat.Subsystem]
00616| 		if !ok {
00617| 			section = &dashboardSection{Name: feat.Subsystem}
00618| 			bySubsystem[feat.Subsystem] = section
00619| 		}
00620| 		section.Total++
00621| 
00622| 		switch mi.Status {
00623| 		case "parity-verified":
00624| 			totals.ParityVerified++
00625| 			section.ParityVerified++
00626| 		case "implemented":
00627| 			totals.Implemented++
00628| 			section.Implemented++
00629| 		default:
00630| 			totals.Missing++
00631| 			section.Missing++
00632| 		}
00633| 	}
00634| 
00635| 	sections := make([]dashboardSection, 0, len(bySubsystem))
00636| 	for _, section := range bySubsystem {
00637| 		if section.Total > 0 {
00638| 			section.Coverage = 100 * float64(section.ParityVerified) / float64(section.Total)
00639| 		}
00640| 		sections = append(sections, *section)
00641| 	}
00642| 	sort.Slice(sections, func(i, j int) bool { return sections[i].Name < sections[j].Name })
00643| 
00644| 	dashboard := dashboardJSON{
00645| 		SchemaVersion: schemaVersion,
00646| 		GeneratedAt:   time.Now().UTC().Format(time.RFC3339),
00647| 		Totals:        totals,
00648| 		Subsystems:    sections,
00649| 	}
00650| 
00651| 	if err := writeJSON(*outJSON, dashboard); err != nil {
00652| 		fatalf("write dashboard json: %v", err)
00653| 	}
00654| 
00655| 	var b strings.Builder
00656| 	b.WriteString("# Parity Dashboard\n\n")
00657| 	b.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("Generated: %s UTC\n\n", time.Now().UTC().Format(time.RFC3339)))
00658| 	b.WriteString("## Totals\n\n")
00659| 	b.WriteString("| Metric | Value |\n")
00660| 	b.WriteString("|---|---:|\n")
00661| 	b.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("| Total features | %d |\n", totals.TotalFeatures))
00662| 	b.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("| Missing | %d |\n", totals.Missing))
00663| 	b.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("| Implemented | %d |\n", totals.Implemented))
00664| 	b.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("| Parity verified | %d |\n", totals.ParityVerified))
00665| 
00666| 	b.WriteString("\n## By Subsystem\n\n")
00667| 	b.WriteString("| Subsystem | Total | Missing | Implemented | Parity Verified | Coverage |\n")
00668| 	b.WriteString("|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|\n")
00669| 	for _, section := range sections {
00670| 		b.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("| %s | %d | %d | %d | %d | %.2f%% |\n",
00671| 			section.Name,
00672| 			section.Total,
00673| 			section.Missing,
00674| 			section.Implemented,
00675| 			section.ParityVerified,
00676| 			section.Coverage,
00677| 		))
00678| 	}
00679| 
00680| 	if err := writeText(*outMD, b.String()); err != nil {
00681| 		fatalf("write dashboard markdown: %v", err)
00682| 	}
00683| }

00685| func generateFeatures(sources []string) ([]featureItem, error) {
00686| 	fset := token.NewFileSet()
00687| 	seen := make(map[featureKey]featureItem)
00688| 
00689| 	for _, source := range sources {
00690| 		file, err := parser.ParseFile(fset, source, nil, parser.ParseComments)
00691| 		if err != nil {
00692| 			return nil, fmt.Errorf("parse %s: %w", source, err)
00693| 		}
00694| 
00695| 		for _, decl := range file.Decls {
00696| 			switch d := decl.(type) {
00697| 			case *ast.FuncDecl:
00698| 				kind := "function"
00699| 				symbol := d.Name.Name
00700| 				if d.Recv != nil {
00701| 					kind = "method"
00702| 					recv := receiverType(d.Recv.List)
00703| 					symbol = recv + "." + d.Name.Name
00704| 				}
00705| 				addFeature(seen, makeFeature(source, subsystemForPath(source), kind, symbol, nodeDoc(d.Doc)))
00706| 
00707| 			case *ast.GenDecl:
00708| 				for _, spec := range d.Specs {
00709| 					switch s := spec.(type) {
00710| 					case *ast.TypeSpec:
00711| 						specDoc := nodeDoc(d.Doc, s.Doc)
00712| 						addFeature(seen, makeFeature(source, subsystemForPath(source), "type", s.Name.Name, specDoc))
00713| 						switch t := s.Type.(type) {
00714| 						case *ast.StructType:
00715| 							for _, field := range t.Fields.List {
00716| 								fieldDoc := nodeDoc(field.Doc, field.Comment)
00717| 								if fieldDoc == "" {
00718| 									fieldDoc = specDoc
00719| 								}
00720| 								names := fieldNames(field)
00721| 								for _, name := range names {
00722| 									addFeature(seen, makeFeature(source, subsystemForPath(source), "struct_field", s.Name.Name+"."+name, fieldDoc))
00723| 								}
00724| 							}
00725| 						case *ast.InterfaceType:
00726| 							for _, field := range t.Methods.List {
00727| 								methodDoc := nodeDoc(field.Doc, field.Comment)
00728| 								if methodDoc == "" {
00729| 									methodDoc = specDoc
00730| 								}
00731| 								names := fieldNames(field)
00732| 								for _, name := range names {
00733| 									addFeature(seen, makeFeature(source, subsystemForPath(source), "interface_method", s.Name.Name+"."+name, methodDoc))
00734| 								}
00735| 							}
00736| 						}
00737| 					case *ast.ValueSpec:
00738| 						kind := "var"
00739| 						if d.Tok == token.CONST {
00740| 							kind = "const"
00741| 						}
00742| 						comment := nodeDoc(d.Doc, s.Doc)
00743| 						for _, n := range s.Names {
00744| 							addFeature(seen, makeFeature(source, subsystemForPath(source), kind, n.Name, comment))
00745| 						}
00746| 					}
00747| 				}
00748| 			}
00749| 		}
00750| 	}
00751| 
00752| 	items := make([]featureItem, 0, len(seen))
00753| 	for _, feat := range seen {
00754| 		if feat.Behavior == "" {
00755| 			feat.Behavior = fmt.Sprintf("Auto-generated from %s `%s` in `%s`.", feat.Kind, feat.Symbol, feat.Source)
00756| 		}
00757| 		feat.ID = featureID(feat.Source, feat.Kind, feat.Symbol)
00758| 		feat.RequiredTests = []string{fmt.Sprintf("parity/%s", feat.ID)}
00759| 		feat.Status = "missing"
00760| 		items = append(items, feat)
00761| 	}
00762| 
00763| 	sort.Slice(items, func(i, j int) bool {
00764| 		if items[i].Source != items[j].Source {
00765| 			return items[i].Source < items[j].Source
00766| 		}
00767| 		if items[i].Kind != items[j].Kind {
00768| 			return items[i].Kind < items[j].Kind
00769| 		}
00770| 		return items[i].Symbol < items[j].Symbol
00771| 	})
00772| 
00773| 	return items, nil
00774| }
00775| 
00776| func receiverType(list []*ast.Field) string {
00777| 	if len(list) == 0 {
00778| 		return "<unknown>"
00779| 	}
00780| 	expr := list[0].Type
00781| 	for {
00782| 		switch t := expr.(type) {
00783| 		case *ast.Ident:
00784| 			return t.Name
00785| 		case *ast.StarExpr:
00786| 			expr = t.X
00787| 		case *ast.IndexExpr:
00788| 			expr = t.X
00789| 		case *ast.IndexListExpr:
00790| 			expr = t.X
00791| 		default:
00792| 			return exprString(expr)
00793| 		}
00794| 	}
00795| }
00796| 
00797| func fieldNames(field *ast.Field) []string {
00798| 	if len(field.Names) == 0 {
00799| 		return []string{exprString(field.Type)}
00800| 	}
00801| 	names := make([]string, 0, len(field.Names))
00802| 	for _, n := range field.Names {
00803| 		names = append(names, n.Name)
00804| 	}
00805| 	return names
00806| }
00807| 
00808| func exprString(expr ast.Expr) string {
00809| 	var b strings.Builder
00810| 	_ = printer.Fprint(&b, token.NewFileSet(), expr)
00811| 	return b.String()
00812| }

00814| func makeFeature(source, subsystem, kind, symbol, behavior string) featureItem {
00815| 	return featureItem{
00816| 		Source:    source,
00817| 		Subsystem: subsystem,
00818| 		Kind:      kind,
00819| 		Symbol:    symbol,
00820| 		Behavior:  cleanDoc(behavior),
00821| 	}
00822| }
00823| 
00824| func addFeature(seen map[featureKey]featureItem, feat featureItem) {
00825| 	key := featureKey{Source: feat.Source, Kind: feat.Kind, Symbol: feat.Symbol}
00826| 	if existing, ok := seen[key]; ok {
00827| 		if existing.Behavior == "" && feat.Behavior != "" {
00828| 			seen[key] = feat
00829| 		}
00830| 		return
00831| 	}
00832| 	seen[key] = feat
00833| }
00834| 
00835| func nodeDoc(groups ...*ast.CommentGroup) string {
00836| 	for _, g := range groups {
00837| 		if g == nil {
00838| 			continue
00839| 		}
00840| 		t := strings.TrimSpace(g.Text())
00841| 		if t != "" {
00842| 			return t
00843| 		}
00844| 	}
00845| 	return ""
00846| }
00847| 
00848| func cleanDoc(doc string) string {
00849| 	doc = strings.ReplaceAll(doc, "\n", " ")
00850| 	doc = strings.Join(strings.Fields(doc), " ")
00851| 	return strings.TrimSpace(doc)
00852| }
00853| 
00854| func featureID(source, kind, symbol string) string {
00855| 	sum := sha1.Sum([]byte(source + "|" + kind + "|" + symbol))
00856| 	return "feat-" + hex.EncodeToString(sum[:])[:12]
00857| }
00858| 
00859| func subsystemForPath(path string) string {
00860| 	switch {
00861| 	case strings.HasPrefix(path, "lib/config/"):
00862| 		return "config"
00863| 	case strings.HasPrefix(path, "lib/model/"):
00864| 		return "model"
00865| 	case strings.HasPrefix(path, "lib/protocol/"):
00866| 		return "protocol"
00867| 	case strings.HasPrefix(path, "internal/gen/bep/"):
00868| 		return "protocol"
00869| 	case strings.HasPrefix(path, "internal/db/"):
00870| 		return "db"
00871| 	default:
00872| 		parts := strings.Split(path, "/")
00873| 		if len(parts) > 0 {
00874| 			return parts[0]
00875| 		}
00876| 		return "unknown"
00877| 	}
00878| }

00880| func resolveSources(patterns []string) ([]string, error) {
00881| 	set := make(map[string]struct{})
00882| 	for _, pattern := range patterns {
00883| 		matches, err := filepath.Glob(pattern)
00884| 		if err != nil {
00885| 			return nil, fmt.Errorf("glob %q: %w", pattern, err)
00886| 		}
00887| 		if len(matches) == 0 {
00888| 			return nil, fmt.Errorf("pattern %q matched no files", pattern)
00889| 		}
00890| 		for _, match := range matches {
00891| 			rel := filepath.ToSlash(match)
00892| 			set[rel] = struct{}{}
00893| 		}
00894| 	}
00895| 
00896| 	sources := make([]string, 0, len(set))
00897| 	for source := range set {
00898| 		sources = append(sources, source)
00899| 	}
00900| 	sort.Strings(sources)
00901| 	return sources, nil
00902| }

00923| func loadRequiredTestEvidence(report *guardrailReport) requiredTestEvidence {
00924| 	ev := requiredTestEvidence{
00925| 		ScenarioIDs:          make(map[string]struct{}),
00926| 		RequiredScenarioIDs:  make(map[string]struct{}),
00927| 		ScenarioOutcome:      make(map[string]string),
00928| 		ScenarioEvidence:     make(map[string]string),
00929| 		ScenarioGoEvidence:   make(map[string]string),
00930| 		ScenarioRustEvidence: make(map[string]string),
00931| 		ScenarioTags:         make(map[string]map[string]struct{}),
00932| 		ScenarioRefs:         make(map[string]int),
00933| 		ScenarioParityBlocks: make(map[string]int),
00934| 	}
00935| 
00936| 	cfg := harnessScenarioFile{}
00937| 	if err := readJSON("parity/harness/scenarios.json", &cfg); err != nil {
00938| 		report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
00939| 			Rule:    "required-tests",
00940| 			Path:    "parity/harness/scenarios.json",
00941| 			Message: "missing or invalid harness scenarios file",
00942| 		})
00943| 		return ev
00944| 	}
00945| 
00946| 	for _, sc := range cfg.Scenarios {
00947| 		id := strings.TrimSpace(sc.ID)
00948| 		if id == "" {
00949| 			report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
00950| 				Rule:    "required-tests",
00951| 				Path:    "parity/harness/scenarios.json",
00952| 				Message: "scenario entry with empty id",
00953| 			})
00954| 			continue
00955| 		}
00956| 		if _, exists := ev.ScenarioIDs[id]; exists {
00957| 			report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
00958| 				Rule:    "required-tests",
00959| 				Path:    "parity/harness/scenarios.json",
00960| 				Message: fmt.Sprintf("duplicate scenario id %q", id),
00961| 			})
00962| 			continue
00963| 		}
00964| 		ev.ScenarioIDs[id] = struct{}{}
00965| 		tagSet := make(map[string]struct{})
00966| 		for _, tag := range sc.Tags {
00967| 			normalized := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(tag))
00968| 			if normalized == "" {
00969| 				continue
00970| 			}
00971| 			tagSet[normalized] = struct{}{}
00972| 		}
00973| 		ev.ScenarioTags[id] = tagSet
00974| 		if sc.Required {
00975| 			ev.RequiredScenarioIDs[id] = struct{}{}
00976| 		}
00977| 	}
00978| 
00979| 	latest := differentialReport{}
00980| 	if err := readJSON("parity/diff-reports/latest.json", &latest); err != nil {
00981| 		report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
00982| 			Rule:    "required-tests",
00983| 			Path:    "parity/diff-reports/latest.json",
00984| 			Message: "missing or invalid latest differential report for scenario outcomes",
00985| 		})
00986| 		return ev
00987| 	}
00988| 	for _, sc := range latest.Scenarios {
00989| 		id := strings.TrimSpace(sc.ID)
00990| 		if id == "" {
00991| 			continue
00992| 		}
00993| 		ev.ScenarioOutcome[id] = strings.TrimSpace(sc.Status)
00994| 		ev.ScenarioEvidence[id] = normalizeScenarioEvidence(sc.Evidence)
00995| 		ev.ScenarioGoEvidence[id] = normalizeScenarioEvidence(sc.GoEvidence)
00996| 		ev.ScenarioRustEvidence[id] = normalizeScenarioEvidence(sc.RustEvidence)
00997| 	}
00998| 	return ev
00999| }

01001| func validateManifestAgainstGeneratedFeatures(report *guardrailReport, manifest featureManifest, generated []featureItem) {
01002| 	generatedByID := make(map[string]featureItem, len(generated))
01003| 	for _, feat := range generated {
01004| 		generatedByID[feat.ID] = feat
01005| 	}
01006| 
01007| 	manifestByID := make(map[string]featureItem, len(manifest.Items))
01008| 	for _, feat := range manifest.Items {
01009| 		if strings.TrimSpace(feat.ID) == "" {
01010| 			report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
01011| 				Rule:    "manifest-shape",
01012| 				Path:    "parity/feature-manifest.json",
01013| 				Message: "feature is missing id",
01014| 			})
01015| 			continue
01016| 		}
01017| 		if strings.TrimSpace(feat.Source) == "" || strings.TrimSpace(feat.Kind) == "" || strings.TrimSpace(feat.Symbol) == "" {
01018| 			report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
01019| 				Rule:    "manifest-shape",
01020| 				ID:      feat.ID,
01021| 				Path:    "parity/feature-manifest.json",
01022| 				Message: "feature is missing source/kind/symbol metadata",
01023| 			})
01024| 			continue
01025| 		}
01026| 		manifestByID[feat.ID] = feat
01027| 
01028| 		expected, ok := generatedByID[feat.ID]
01029| 		if !ok {
01030| 			report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
01031| 				Rule:    "manifest-stale",
01032| 				ID:      feat.ID,
01033| 				Path:    "parity/feature-manifest.json",
01034| 				Message: "feature id does not exist in current Go source-of-truth inventory",
01035| 			})
01036| 			continue
01037| 		}
01038| 		if feat.Source != expected.Source || feat.Subsystem != expected.Subsystem || feat.Kind != expected.Kind || feat.Symbol != expected.Symbol {
01039| 			report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
01040| 				Rule:    "manifest-drift",
01041| 				ID:      feat.ID,
01042| 				Path:    "parity/feature-manifest.json",
01043| 				Message: "manifest metadata differs from current generated Go feature inventory",
01044| 			})
01045| 		}
01046| 	}
01047| 
01048| 	for _, feat := range generated {
01049| 		if _, ok := manifestByID[feat.ID]; ok {
01050| 			continue
01051| 		}
01052| 		report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
01053| 			Rule:    "manifest-missing",
01054| 			ID:      feat.ID,
01055| 			Path:    "parity/feature-manifest.json",
01056| 			Message: "generated feature is missing from manifest",
01057| 		})
01058| 	}
01059| }

01061| func validateImplementedLike(report *guardrailReport, feat featureItem, mi mappingItem, ev *requiredTestEvidence, mode string) {
01062| 	if strings.TrimSpace(mi.RustComponent) == "" {
01063| 		report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
01064| 			Rule:    "mapping-rust-component",
01065| 			ID:      mi.ID,
01066| 			Message: "implemented feature is missing rust_component",
01067| 		})
01068| 	}
01069| 	if _, isStub := disallowedStubComponents[strings.TrimSpace(mi.RustComponent)]; isStub {
01070| 		report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
01071| 			Rule:    "implementation-stub",
01072| 			ID:      mi.ID,
01073| 			Message: fmt.Sprintf("feature is mapped to stub/surface component %q", mi.RustComponent),
01074| 		})
01075| 	}
01076| 	if strings.TrimSpace(mi.RustSymbol) == "" {
01077| 		report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
01078| 			Rule:    "mapping-rust-symbol",
01079| 			ID:      mi.ID,
01080| 			Message: "implemented feature is missing rust_symbol",
01081| 		})
01082| 	}
01083| 	if len(mi.RequiredTests) == 0 {
01084| 		report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
01085| 			Rule:    "mapping-required-tests",
01086| 			ID:      mi.ID,
01087| 			Message: "implemented feature has no required_tests",
01088| 		})
01089| 		return
01090| 	}
01091| 
01092| 	scenarioRefs := 0
01093| 	for _, testRef := range mi.RequiredTests {
01094| 		testRef = strings.TrimSpace(testRef)
01095| 		if testRef == "" {
01096| 			continue
01097| 		}
01098| 		if !strings.HasPrefix(testRef, "scenario/") {
01099| 			continue
01100| 		}
01101| 		scenarioRefs++
01102| 		scenarioID := strings.TrimSpace(strings.TrimPrefix(testRef, "scenario/"))
01103| 		if scenarioID == "" {
01104| 			report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
01105| 				Rule:    "mapping-required-tests",
01106| 				ID:      mi.ID,
01107| 				Message: "scenario/ required_test has empty scenario id",
01108| 			})
01109| 			continue
01110| 		}
01111| 		if _, ok := ev.ScenarioIDs[scenarioID]; !ok {
01112| 			report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
01113| 				Rule:    "mapping-required-tests",
01114| 				ID:      mi.ID,
01115| 				Message: fmt.Sprintf("required_test %q does not map to parity/harness/scenarios.json", testRef),
01116| 			})
01117| 			continue
01118| 		}
01119| 		ev.ScenarioRefs[scenarioID]++
01120| 		if mi.Status == "parity-verified" {
01121| 			status := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(ev.ScenarioOutcome[scenarioID]))
01122| 			if status != "pass" {
01123| 				ev.ScenarioParityBlocks[scenarioID]++
01124| 			}
01125| 		}
01126| 	}
01127| 	if scenarioRefs == 0 {
01128| 		report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
01129| 			Rule:    "mapping-required-tests",
01130| 			ID:      mi.ID,
01131| 			Message: fmt.Sprintf("feature %s (%s) must include at least one scenario/<id> required_test", feat.Symbol, feat.Source),
01132| 		})
01133| 	}
01134| 
01135| 	if mode == "replacement" {
01136| 		if reason := specificRustSymbolRequirement(feat, mi); reason != "" {
01137| 			report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
01138| 				Rule:    "mapping-symbol-specificity",
01139| 				ID:      mi.ID,
01140| 				Message: reason,
01141| 			})
01142| 		}
01143| 	}
01144| }

01146| func specificRustSymbolRequirement(feat featureItem, mi mappingItem) string {
01147| 	kind := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(feat.Kind))
01148| 	switch kind {
01149| 	case "method", "interface_method", "func":
01150| 	default:
01151| 		return ""
01152| 	}
01153| 	rustSymbol := strings.TrimSpace(mi.RustSymbol)
01154| 	if rustSymbol == "" {
01155| 		return ""
01156| 	}
01157| 	expected := expectedSourceSpecificToken(feat.Symbol, kind)
01158| 	if expected == "" {
01159| 		return ""
01160| 	}
01161| 	normalizedRustWhole := normalizeSurfaceToken(rustSymbol)
01162| 	if strings.Contains(normalizedRustWhole, expected) {
01163| 		return ""
01164| 	}
01165| 	rustToken := trailingRustSymbolToken(rustSymbol)
01166| 	if normalizeSurfaceToken(rustToken) == expected {
01167| 		return ""
01168| 	}
01169| 	return fmt.Sprintf(
01170| 		"replacement mode requires a specific rust_symbol for %s %q; expected token %q to appear in rust_symbol %q",
01171| 		feat.Kind,
01172| 		feat.Symbol,
01173| 		expected,
01174| 		mi.RustSymbol,
01175| 	)
01176| }
01177| 
01178| func expectedSourceSpecificToken(symbol, kind string) string {
01179| 	symbol = strings.TrimSpace(symbol)
01180| 	if symbol == "" {
01181| 		return ""
01182| 	}
01183| 	switch kind {
01184| 	case "method", "interface_method", "struct_field":
01185| 		if idx := strings.LastIndex(symbol, "."); idx >= 0 && idx+1 < len(symbol) {
01186| 			return normalizeSurfaceToken(symbol[idx+1:])
01187| 		}
01188| 	case "const", "var", "func":
01189| 		if idx := strings.LastIndex(symbol, "."); idx >= 0 && idx+1 < len(symbol) {
01190| 			return normalizeSurfaceToken(symbol[idx+1:])
01191| 		}
01192| 	}
01193| 	return normalizeSurfaceToken(symbol)
01194| }
01195| 
01196| func trailingRustSymbolToken(symbol string) string {
01197| 	symbol = strings.TrimSpace(symbol)
01198| 	if symbol == "" {
01199| 		return ""
01200| 	}
01201| 	split := strings.FieldsFunc(symbol, func(r rune) bool {
01202| 		return r == ':' || r == '.' || r == '/' || r == '\\'
01203| 	})
01204| 	if len(split) == 0 {
01205| 		return symbol
01206| 	}
01207| 	return split[len(split)-1]
01208| }

01280| 		if _, dup := seen[id]; dup {

01386| func inferredRequiredEvidenceByScenario(ev requiredTestEvidence, id string) (string, string) {

01390| 	} else if scenarioHasTag(ev, id, "interop") {
01391| 		required = "peer-interop"
01392| 	}
01393| 	return required, required
01394| }

01535| 		})
01536| 		return
01537| 	}
01538| 
01539| 	snapshot := map[string]any{}
01540| 	const path = "parity/harness/snapshots/rust-daemon-api-surface.json"
01541| 	if err := readJSON(path, &snapshot); err != nil {
01542| 		report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
01543| 			Rule:    "replacement-api-coverage",

01547| 		return
01548| 	}
01549| 	covered := toStringSet(snapshot["covered_endpoints"])
01550| 	missing := missingRequiredStrings(required, covered)
01551| 	if len(missing) > 0 {

01560| 	assertionsRaw, ok := snapshot["endpoint_assertions"].(map[string]any)
01561| 	if !ok || len(assertionsRaw) == 0 {

01566| 		})
01567| 		return
01568| 	}
01569| 
01570| 	requiredKeysByEndpoint := replacementAPIRequiredResponseKeys()
01571| 	for _, endpoint := range required {
01572| 		endpoint = strings.TrimSpace(endpoint)
01573| 		if endpoint == "" {
01574| 			continue
01575| 		}
01576| 		rawAssertion, found := assertionsRaw[endpoint]
01577| 		if !found {
01578| 			report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
01579| 				Rule:    "replacement-api-coverage",

01581| 				Message: fmt.Sprintf("rust daemon api surface missing assertion for required endpoint %q", endpoint),
01582| 			})
01583| 			continue
01584| 		}
01585| 
01586| 		assertion, ok := rawAssertion.(map[string]any)
01587| 		if !ok {

01589| 				Rule:    "replacement-api-coverage",

01591| 				Message: fmt.Sprintf("rust daemon api assertion for %q has invalid shape", endpoint),
01592| 			})
01593| 			continue
01594| 		}
01595| 
01596| 		statusCode, ok := jsonNumberToInt(assertion["status_code"])
01597| 		if !ok || statusCode != 200 {
01598| 			report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
01599| 				Rule:    "replacement-api-coverage",

01607| 		if !ok || (responseKind != "object" && responseKind != "array") {
01608| 			report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{

02410| 	if metrics.PostRestartLocalFiles < expectedLocalFiles || metrics.PostRestartGlobalFiles < expectedLocalFiles {
02411| 		return metrics, fmt.Errorf("rust post-restart status did not observe expected files (local=%d global=%d need=%d)",
02412| 			metrics.PostRestartLocalFiles, metrics.PostRestartGlobalFiles, metrics.PostRestartNeedFiles)
02413| 	}
02414| 	if err := verifyIndexedFiles(restartURL, "", "default", []string{"a.txt", "nested/b.txt"}); err != nil {
02415| 		return metrics, fmt.Errorf("rust post-restart file verification: %w", err)
02416| 	}
02417| 	metrics.PostRestartFilesIndexed = true
02418| 	postProjection, err := buildStateProjection(restartURL, "", []string{"default"}, false)
02419| 	if err != nil {
02420| 		return metrics, fmt.Errorf("rust post-restart state projection: %w", err)
02421| 	}
02422| 	metrics.StateProjection = mergeProjectionWithPhases(postProjection, map[string]any{
02423| 		"pre_crash":    preProjection,
02424| 		"post_restart": postProjection,
02425| 	})
02426| 
02427| 	if _, _, err := requestJSON(http.MethodPost, restartURL+"/rest/system/shutdown", ""); err != nil {
02428| 		return metrics, fmt.Errorf("rust restart shutdown request: %w", err)
02429| 	}
02430| 	metrics.RestartShutdownRequested = true
02431| 	if err := restarted.wait(shutdownTimeout); err != nil {
02432| 		return metrics, fmt.Errorf("rust restart shutdown wait: %w", err)
02433| 	}
02434| 	return metrics, nil
02435| }

02437| func prepareSoakFolder(folderDir string, seed int64) error {
02438| 	if err := os.MkdirAll(filepath.Join(folderDir, "nested"), 0o755); err != nil {
02439| 		return fmt.Errorf("create folder tree: %w", err)
02440| 	}
02441| 	if err := os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(folderDir, ".stfolder"), []byte(""), 0o644); err != nil {
02442| 		return fmt.Errorf("write marker file: %w", err)
02443| 	}
02444| 	if err := os.WriteFile(
02445| 		filepath.Join(folderDir, "a.txt"),
02446| 		[]byte(seededPayload("hello", seed)),
02447| 		0o644,
02448| 	); err != nil {
02449| 		return fmt.Errorf("write a.txt: %w", err)
02450| 	}
02451| 	if err := os.WriteFile(
02452| 		filepath.Join(folderDir, "nested", "b.txt"),
02453| 		[]byte(seededPayload("world", seed+1)),
02454| 		0o644,
02455| 	); err != nil {
02456| 		return fmt.Errorf("write nested/b.txt: %w", err)
02457| 	}
02458| 	return nil
02459| }

02461| func prepareMultiFolderSoakFolder(folderDir string, seed int64) error {
02462| 	if err := prepareSoakFolder(folderDir, seed); err != nil {
02463| 		return err
02464| 	}
02465| 	for _, dir := range []string{"a", "a.d"} {
02466| 		if err := os.MkdirAll(filepath.Join(folderDir, dir), 0o755); err != nil {
02467| 			return fmt.Errorf("create %s: %w", dir, err)
02468| 		}
02469| 	}
02470| 	files := map[string]string{
02471| 		"a/x.txt":   seededPayload("ax", seed+2),
02472| 		"a/z.txt":   seededPayload("az", seed+3),
02473| 		"a.d/x.txt": seededPayload("adx", seed+4),
02474| 		"a.d/y.txt": seededPayload("ady", seed+5),
02475| 	}
02476| 	for rel, content := range files {
02477| 		if err := os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(folderDir, rel), []byte(content), 0o644); err != nil {
02478| 			return fmt.Errorf("write %s: %w", rel, err)
02479| 		}
02480| 	}
02481| 	return nil
02482| }

02505| func parseAPIKey(configPath string) (string, error) {
02506| 	bs, err := os.ReadFile(configPath)
02507| 	if err != nil {
02508| 		return "", fmt.Errorf("read config %s: %w", configPath, err)
02509| 	}
02510| 	re := regexp.MustCompile(`<apikey>([^<]+)</apikey>`)
02511| 	match := re.FindStringSubmatch(string(bs))
02512| 	if len(match) != 2 {
02513| 		return "", fmt.Errorf("parse api key from %s", configPath)
02514| 	}
02515| 	key := strings.TrimSpace(match[1])
02516| 	if key == "" {
02517| 		return "", fmt.Errorf("empty api key in %s", configPath)
02518| 	}
02519| 	return key, nil
02520| }

02522| func runCmd(timeout time.Duration, name string, args ...string) error {
02523| 	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), timeout)
02524| 	defer cancel()
02525| 	cmd := exec.CommandContext(ctx, name, args...)
02526| 	cmd.Stdout = io.Discard
02527| 	var stderr bytes.Buffer
02528| 	cmd.Stderr = &stderr
02529| 	if err := cmd.Run(); err != nil {
02530| 		if errors.Is(ctx.Err(), context.DeadlineExceeded) {
02531| 			return fmt.Errorf("timeout running %s %s", name, strings.Join(args, " "))
02532| 		}
02533| 		msg := strings.TrimSpace(stderr.String())
02534| 		if msg == "" {
02535| 			msg = err.Error()
02536| 		}
02537| 		return fmt.Errorf("%s %s: %s", name, strings.Join(args, " "), msg)
02538| 	}
02539| 	return nil
02540| }

02542| func freePort() (int, error) {
02543| 	ln, err := net.Listen("tcp", "127.0.0.1:0")
02544| 	if err != nil {
02545| 		return 0, fmt.Errorf("allocate free port: %w", err)
02546| 	}
02547| 	defer ln.Close()
02548| 	addr, ok := ln.Addr().(*net.TCPAddr)
02549| 	if !ok {
02550| 		return 0, fmt.Errorf("unexpected listener addr type %T", ln.Addr())
02551| 	}
02552| 	return addr.Port, nil
02553| }

02555| func waitForPing(baseURL, apiKey string, timeout time.Duration) error {
02556| 	deadline := time.Now().Add(timeout)
02557| 	for time.Now().Before(deadline) {
02558| 		_, status, err := requestJSON(http.MethodGet, baseURL+"/rest/system/ping", apiKey)
02559| 		if err == nil && status == http.StatusOK {
02560| 			return nil
02561| 		}
02562| 		time.Sleep(200 * time.Millisecond)
02563| 	}
02564| 	return fmt.Errorf("timed out waiting for ping")
02565| }

02567| func verifyRuntimeIdentity(baseURL, apiKey, expectedSource string) error {
02568| 	payload, status, err := requestJSON(http.MethodGet, baseURL+"/rest/system/version", apiKey)
02569| 	if err != nil {
02570| 		return fmt.Errorf("request version endpoint: %w", err)
02571| 	}
02572| 	if status != http.StatusOK {
02573| 		return fmt.Errorf("version endpoint returned status %d", status)
02574| 	}
02575| 
02576| 	longVersion := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(stringField(payload, "longVersion")))
02577| 	version := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(stringField(payload, "version")))
02578| 	isRustSignature := strings.Contains(longVersion, "syncthing-rs") || strings.Contains(version, "syncthing-rs")
02579| 	switch strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(expectedSource)) {
02580| 	case "go":
02581| 		if isRustSignature {
02582| 			return fmt.Errorf("expected go runtime but version payload reports rust: longVersion=%q version=%q", longVersion, version)
02583| 		}
02584| 	case "rust":
02585| 		if !isRustSignature {
02586| 			return fmt.Errorf("expected rust runtime signature in version payload, got longVersion=%q version=%q", longVersion, version)
02587| 		}
02588| 	default:
02589| 		return fmt.Errorf("unsupported runtime source expectation %q", expectedSource)
02590| 	}
02591| 	return nil
02592| }

02606| func pollStatusForFolder(
02607| 	baseURL, apiKey, folder string,
02608| 	minLocalFiles, minGlobalFiles int,
02609| 	requireRunnableState bool,
02610| 	timeout time.Duration,
02611| ) (map[string]any, int, error) {
02612| 	deadline := time.Now().Add(timeout)
02613| 	polls := 0
02614| 	var last map[string]any
02615| 	target := encodeURLQuery(baseURL+"/rest/db/status", url.Values{"folder": []string{folder}})
02616| 	for time.Now().Before(deadline) {
02617| 		polls++
02618| 		payload, status, err := requestJSON(http.MethodGet, target, apiKey)
02619| 		if err == nil && status == http.StatusOK {
02620| 			last = payload
02621| 			localOK := intField(payload, "localFiles") >= minLocalFiles
02622| 			globalOK := intField(payload, "globalFiles") >= minGlobalFiles
02623| 			stateOK := true
02624| 			if requireRunnableState {
02625| 				stateOK = stateIsRunnable(stringField(payload, "state"))
02626| 			}
02627| 			if localOK && globalOK && stateOK {
02628| 				return payload, polls, nil
02629| 			}
02630| 		}
02631| 		time.Sleep(200 * time.Millisecond)
02632| 	}
02633| 	if last == nil {
02634| 		last = map[string]any{}
02635| 	}
02636| 	return last, polls, fmt.Errorf("timed out waiting for status convergence for folder %q", folder)
02637| }

02649| 	for time.Now().Before(deadline) {

02655| 			stateOK := true

02671| func verifyIndexedFiles(baseURL, apiKey, folder string, files []string) error {
02672| 	for _, file := range files {
02673| 		query := url.Values{}
02674| 		query.Set("folder", folder)
02675| 		query.Set("file", file)
02676| 		target := encodeURLQuery(baseURL+"/rest/db/file", query)
02677| 		payload, status, err := requestJSON(http.MethodGet, target, apiKey)
02678| 		if err != nil {
02679| 			return fmt.Errorf("request %s: %w", target, err)
02680| 		}
02681| 		if status != http.StatusOK {
02682| 			return fmt.Errorf("request %s returned status %d", target, status)
02683| 		}
02684| 		if err := validateIndexedFilePayload(payload, file); err != nil {
02685| 			return fmt.Errorf("request %s %w payload=%v", target, err, payload)
02686| 		}
02687| 	}
02688| 	return nil
02689| }
02690| 
02691| func validateIndexedFilePayload(payload map[string]any, expectedFile string) error {
02692| 	if len(payload) == 0 {
02693| 		return fmt.Errorf("returned empty payload")
02694| 	}
02695| 	if existsRaw, hasExists := payload["exists"]; hasExists {
02696| 		exists, ok := existsRaw.(bool)
02697| 		if !ok || !exists {
02698| 			return fmt.Errorf("returned non-existing entry")
02699| 		}
02700| 		entry, ok := payload["entry"].(map[string]any)
02701| 		if !ok {
02702| 			return fmt.Errorf("returned invalid entry object")
02703| 		}
02704| 		return validateIndexedEntry(entry, expectedFile)
02705| 	}
02706| 
02707| 	// Go's /rest/db/file shape exposes local/global objects instead of exists/entry.
02708| 	if local, ok := payload["local"].(map[string]any); ok && len(local) > 0 {
02709| 		if err := validateIndexedEntry(local, expectedFile); err == nil {
02710| 			return nil
02711| 		}
02712| 	}
02713| 	if global, ok := payload["global"].(map[string]any); ok && len(global) > 0 {
02714| 		if err := validateIndexedEntry(global, expectedFile); err == nil {
02715| 			return nil
02716| 		}
02717| 	}
02718| 	return fmt.Errorf("returned no recognizable indexed entry")
02719| }
02720| 
02721| func validateIndexedEntry(entry map[string]any, expectedFile string) error {
02722| 	if len(entry) == 0 {
02723| 		return fmt.Errorf("entry missing")
02724| 	}
02725| 	if deleted, ok := entry["deleted"].(bool); ok && deleted {
02726| 		return fmt.Errorf("entry marked deleted")
02727| 	}
02728| 	name := strings.TrimSpace(stringField(entry, "path"))
02729| 	if name == "" {
02730| 		name = strings.TrimSpace(stringField(entry, "name"))
02731| 	}
02732| 	if name == "" {
02733| 		return fmt.Errorf("entry missing name/path")
02734| 	}
02735| 	if expectedFile != "" && name != expectedFile {
02736| 		return fmt.Errorf("entry path mismatch")
02737| 	}
02738| 	if _, ok := entry["size"]; !ok {
02739| 		return fmt.Errorf("entry missing size")
02740| 	}
02741| 	if _, ok := entry["blockHashes"]; ok {
02742| 		return nil
02743| 	}
02744| 	if _, ok := entry["blocksHash"]; ok {
02745| 		return nil
02746| 	}
02747| 	if _, ok := entry["numBlocks"]; ok {
02748| 		return nil
02749| 	}
02750| 	return fmt.Errorf("entry missing block hash metadata")
02751| }

02753| func fetchFolderTypeMap(baseURL, apiKey string) (map[string]string, error) {
02754| 	payload, status, err := requestJSONAny(http.MethodGet, baseURL+"/rest/config/folders", apiKey)
02755| 	if err != nil {
02756| 		return nil, err
02757| 	}
02758| 	if status != http.StatusOK {
02759| 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("config folders request returned status %d", status)
02760| 	}
02761| 	return decodeFolderTypeMap(payload)
02762| }
02763| 
02764| func decodeFolderTypeMap(payload any) (map[string]string, error) {
02765| 	out := make(map[string]string)
02766| 	switch typed := payload.(type) {
02767| 	case []any:
02768| 		for _, item := range typed {
02769| 			entry, ok := item.(map[string]any)
02770| 			if !ok {
02771| 				continue
02772| 			}
02773| 			id := strings.TrimSpace(stringField(entry, "id"))
02774| 			if id == "" {
02775| 				continue
02776| 			}
02777| 			folderType := canonicalFolderType(stringField(entry, "type"))
02778| 			if folderType == "" {
02779| 				folderType = canonicalFolderType(stringField(entry, "folderType"))
02780| 			}
02781| 			if folderType == "" {
02782| 				continue
02783| 			}
02784| 			out[id] = folderType
02785| 		}
02786| 	case map[string]any:
02787| 		return decodeFolderTypeMap(typed["folders"])
02788| 	default:
02789| 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("unsupported /rest/config/folders payload shape %T", payload)
02790| 	}
02791| 	return out, nil
02792| }
02793| 
02794| func canonicalFolderType(value string) string {
02795| 	switch strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(value)) {
02796| 	case "sendreceive", "sendrecv", "readwrite":
02797| 		return "sendrecv"
02798| 	case "sendonly", "readonly":
02799| 		return "sendonly"
02800| 	case "receiveonly", "recvonly":
02801| 		return "recvonly"
02802| 	case "receiveencrypted", "recvenc":
02803| 		return "recvenc"
02804| 	default:
02805| 		return ""
02806| 	}
02807| }
02808| 
02809| func stringMapEquals(left, right map[string]string) bool {
02810| 	if len(left) != len(right) {
02811| 		return false
02812| 	}
02813| 	for key, leftValue := range left {
02814| 		if right[key] != leftValue {
02815| 			return false
02816| 		}
02817| 	}
02818| 	return true
02819| }

02821| func browseOrderedPaths(baseURL, apiKey, folder string, limit int) ([]string, error) {
02822| 	query := url.Values{}
02823| 	query.Set("folder", folder)
02824| 	query.Set("limit", strconv.Itoa(limit))
02825| 	target := encodeURLQuery(baseURL+"/rest/db/browse", query)
02826| 	payloadAny, status, err := requestJSONAny(http.MethodGet, target, apiKey)
02827| 	if err != nil {
02828| 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("request %s: %w", target, err)
02829| 	}
02830| 	if status != http.StatusOK {
02831| 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("request %s returned status %d", target, status)
02832| 	}
02833| 	paths := make([]string, 0, 16)
02834| 	if err := appendBrowsePaths(&paths, "", payloadAny); err != nil {
02835| 		return nil, err
02836| 	}
02837| 	filtered := make([]string, 0, len(paths))
02838| 	for _, p := range paths {
02839| 		p = strings.Trim(strings.ReplaceAll(p, "\\", "/"), "/")
02840| 		if p == "" || strings.HasSuffix(p, "/.stfolder") || p == ".stfolder" {
02841| 			continue
02842| 		}
02843| 		filtered = append(filtered, p)
02844| 	}
02845| 	return filtered, nil
02846| }
02847| 
02848| func appendBrowsePaths(out *[]string, parent string, payload any) error {
02849| 	switch typed := payload.(type) {
02850| 	case []any:
02851| 		for _, item := range typed {
02852| 			if err := appendBrowsePaths(out, parent, item); err != nil {
02853| 				return err
02854| 			}
02855| 		}
02856| 		return nil
02857| 	case map[string]any:
02858| 		if items, ok := typed["items"]; ok {
02859| 			return appendBrowsePaths(out, parent, items)
02860| 		}
02861| 		if path := stringField(typed, "path"); strings.TrimSpace(path) != "" {
02862| 			*out = append(*out, path)
02863| 			return nil
02864| 		}
02865| 		name := stringField(typed, "name")
02866| 		if strings.TrimSpace(name) == "" {
02867| 			return nil
02868| 		}
02869| 		current := name
02870| 		if parent != "" {
02871| 			current = parent + "/" + name
02872| 		}
02873| 		if children, ok := typed["children"]; ok {
02874| 			return appendBrowsePaths(out, current, children)
02875| 		}
02876| 		*out = append(*out, current)
02877| 		return nil
02878| 	default:
02879| 		return fmt.Errorf("unsupported /rest/db/browse payload shape %T", payload)
02880| 	}
02881| }

02883| func buildStateProjection(baseURL, apiKey string, folders []string, includeBrowse bool) (map[string]any, error) {
02884| 	systemStatus, statusCode, err := requestJSON(http.MethodGet, baseURL+"/rest/system/status", apiKey)
02885| 	if err != nil {
02886| 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("request /rest/system/status: %w", err)
02887| 	}
02888| 	if statusCode != http.StatusOK {
02889| 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("/rest/system/status returned status %d", statusCode)
02890| 	}
02891| 	configPayload, statusCode, err := requestJSON(http.MethodGet, baseURL+"/rest/config", apiKey)
02892| 	if err != nil {
02893| 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("request /rest/config: %w", err)
02894| 	}
02895| 	if statusCode != http.StatusOK {
02896| 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("/rest/config returned status %d", statusCode)
02897| 	}
02898| 
02899| 	pendingDevicesPayload, statusCode, err := requestJSONAny(http.MethodGet, baseURL+"/rest/cluster/pending/devices", apiKey)
02900| 	if err != nil {
02901| 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("request /rest/cluster/pending/devices: %w", err)
02902| 	}
02903| 	if statusCode != http.StatusOK {
02904| 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("/rest/cluster/pending/devices returned status %d", statusCode)
02905| 	}
02906| 	pendingFoldersPayload, statusCode, err := requestJSONAny(http.MethodGet, baseURL+"/rest/cluster/pending/folders", apiKey)
02907| 	if err != nil {
02908| 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("request /rest/cluster/pending/folders: %w", err)
02909| 	}
02910| 	if statusCode != http.StatusOK {
02911| 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("/rest/cluster/pending/folders returned status %d", statusCode)
02912| 	}
02913| 
02914| 	myID := strings.TrimSpace(stringField(systemStatus, "myID"))
02915| 	configuredDeviceIDs := dedupeSortedNonEmpty(extractConfigDeviceIDs(configPayload))
02916| 	if myID == "" && len(configuredDeviceIDs) > 0 {
02917| 		myID = configuredDeviceIDs[0]
02918| 	}
02919| 	deviceIDs := []string{}
02920| 	if myID != "" {
02921| 		deviceIDs = []string{myID}
02922| 	}
02923| 
02924| 	folderTypeMap := extractConfigFolderTypeMap(configPayload)
02925| 	folderIDs := dedupeSortedNonEmpty(folders)
02926| 	if len(folderIDs) == 0 {
02927| 		for folderID := range folderTypeMap {
02928| 			folderIDs = append(folderIDs, folderID)
02929| 		}
02930| 		folderIDs = dedupeSortedNonEmpty(folderIDs)
02931| 	}
02932| 
02933| 	folderSummaries := make([]map[string]any, 0, len(folderIDs))
02934| 	for _, folderID := range folderIDs {
02935| 		target := encodeURLQuery(baseURL+"/rest/db/status", url.Values{"folder": []string{folderID}})

02428| func missingNormalizedSurfaceEntries(source, target map[string]struct{}) []string {
02429| 	targetNormalized := make(map[string]struct{}, len(target))
02430| 	for entry := range target {
02431| 		normalized := canonicalSurfaceToken(entry)
02432| 		if normalized == "" {
02433| 			continue
02434| 		}
02435| 		targetNormalized[normalized] = struct{}{}
02436| 	}
02437| 
02438| 	missing := make([]string, 0)
02439| 	for entry := range source {
02440| 		normalized := canonicalSurfaceToken(entry)
02441| 		if normalized == "" {
02442| 			continue
02443| 		}
02444| 		if _, ok := targetNormalized[normalized]; ok {
02445| 			continue
02446| 		}
02447| 		missing = append(missing, entry)
02448| 	}
02449| 	sort.Strings(missing)
02450| 	return missing
02451| }

02453| func extractGoInterfaceMethods(path, ifaceName string) (map[string]struct{}, error) {
02454| 	file, _, err := parseGoRepoFile(path)
02455| 	if err != nil {
02456| 		return nil, err
02457| 	}
02458| 
02459| 	methods := make(map[string]struct{})
02460| 	for _, decl := range file.Decls {
02461| 		gen, ok := decl.(*ast.GenDecl)
02462| 		if !ok || gen.Tok != token.TYPE {
02463| 			continue
02464| 		}
02465| 		for _, spec := range gen.Specs {
02466| 			ts, ok := spec.(*ast.TypeSpec)
02467| 			if !ok || ts.Name.Name != ifaceName {
02468| 				continue
02469| 			}
02470| 			iface, ok := ts.Type.(*ast.InterfaceType)
02471| 			if !ok {
02472| 				continue
02473| 			}
02474| 			for _, field := range iface.Methods.List {
02475| 				for _, name := range fieldNames(field) {
02476| 					if strings.TrimSpace(name) == "" {
02477| 						continue
02478| 					}
02479| 					methods[name] = struct{}{}
02480| 				}
02481| 			}
02482| 		}
02483| 	}
02484| 	if len(methods) == 0 {
02485| 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("no methods found for interface %s", ifaceName)
02486| 	}
02487| 	return methods, nil
02488| }

02558| func extractRustStructFields(path, structName string) (map[string]struct{}, error) {
02559| 	bs, err := readRepoFile(path)
02560| 	if err != nil {
02561| 		return nil, err
02562| 	}
02563| 	lines := strings.Split(string(bs), "\n")
02564| 	startPattern := regexp.MustCompile(`^pub(?:\(crate\))?\s*struct\s+` + regexp.QuoteMeta(structName) + `\b`)
02565| 	fieldPattern := regexp.MustCompile(`^(?:pub(?:\(crate\))?\s+)?([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\s*:`)
02566| 
02567| 	inBlock := false
02568| 	depth := 0
02569| 	fields := make(map[string]struct{})
02570| 	for _, raw := range lines {
02571| 		line := strings.TrimSpace(raw)
02572| 		if !inBlock {
02573| 			if !startPattern.MatchString(line) {
02574| 				continue
02575| 			}
02576| 			inBlock = true
02577| 		}
02578| 		depth += strings.Count(line, "{")
02579| 		if inBlock && depth > 0 {
02580| 			if match := fieldPattern.FindStringSubmatch(line); len(match) == 2 {
02581| 				fields[match[1]] = struct{}{}
02582| 			}
02583| 		}
02584| 		depth -= strings.Count(line, "}")
02585| 		if inBlock && depth <= 0 {
02586| 			break
02587| 		}
02588| 	}
02589| 	if len(fields) == 0 {
02590| 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("no fields found for rust struct %s in %s", structName, path)
02591| 	}
02592| 	return fields, nil
02593| }

02599| 	}
02600| 	lines := strings.Split(string(bs), "\n")
02601| 	fnPattern := regexp.MustCompile(`\bfn\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\s*\(`)
02602| 
02603| 	inBlock := false
02604| 	depth := 0
02605| 	methods := make(map[string]struct{})
02606| 	for _, raw := range lines {
02607| 		line := strings.TrimSpace(raw)
02608| 		if !inBlock {
02609| 			if !startPattern.MatchString(line) {
02610| 				continue
02611| 			}
02612| 			inBlock = true
02613| 		}
02614| 		depth += strings.Count(line, "{")
02615| 		if inBlock && depth > 0 {
02616| 			if match := fnPattern.FindStringSubmatch(line); len(match) == 2 {
02617| 				methods[match[1]] = struct{}{}
02618| 			}
02619| 		}
02620| 		depth -= strings.Count(line, "}")
02621| 		if inBlock && depth <= 0 {
02622| 			break
02623| 		}
02624| 	}
02625| 	if len(methods) == 0 {

02631| func normalizeSurfaceToken(token string) string {
02632| 	token = strings.TrimSpace(token)
02633| 	if token == "" {
02634| 		return ""
02635| 	}
02636| 	var b strings.Builder
02637| 	for _, r := range token {
02638| 		switch {
02639| 		case r >= 'A' && r <= 'Z':
02640| 			b.WriteRune(r + ('a' - 'A'))
02641| 		case r >= 'a' && r <= 'z':
02642| 			b.WriteRune(r)
02643| 		case r >= '0' && r <= '9':
02644| 			b.WriteRune(r)
02645| 		}
02646| 	}
02647| 	return b.String()
02648| }
02649| 
02650| func canonicalSurfaceToken(token string) string {
02651| 	normalized := normalizeSurfaceToken(token)
02652| 	switch normalized {
02653| 	case "foldertype":
02654| 		return "type"
02655| 	case "versioner":
02656| 		return "versioning"
02657| 	default:
02658| 		return normalized
02659| 	}
02660| }

02662| func parseGoRepoFile(path string) (*ast.File, *token.FileSet, error) {
02663| 	bs, err := readRepoFile(path)
02664| 	if err != nil {
02665| 		return nil, nil, err
02666| 	}
02667| 	fset := token.NewFileSet()
02668| 	file, err := parser.ParseFile(fset, path, bs, parser.SkipObjectResolution)
02669| 	if err != nil {
02670| 		return nil, nil, err
02671| 	}
02672| 	return file, fset, nil
02673| }

02677| 	if err != nil {
02678| 		return nil, err
02679| 	}
02680| 	text := string(bs)
02681| 	modes := make(map[string]struct{})
02682| 
02683| 	casePattern := regexp.MustCompile(`case\s+([^\n:]+):`)
02684| 	modePattern := regexp.MustCompile(`"([^"]+)"`)
02685| 	for _, caseMatch := range casePattern.FindAllStringSubmatch(text, -1) {
02686| 		if len(caseMatch) != 2 {
02687| 			continue
02688| 		}
02689| 		for _, modeMatch := range modePattern.FindAllStringSubmatch(caseMatch[1], -1) {
02690| 			if len(modeMatch) != 2 {
02691| 				continue
02692| 			}
02693| 			mode := canonicalFolderMode(modeMatch[1])
02694| 			if mode == "" {
02695| 				continue
02696| 			}
02697| 			modes[mode] = struct{}{}
02698| 		}
02699| 	}
02700| 
02701| 	if len(modes) == 0 {
02702| 		return nil, errors.New("no folder mode literals found")
02703| 	}
02704| 	return modes, nil
02705| }

02707| func canonicalFolderMode(mode string) string {
02708| 	switch strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(mode)) {
02709| 	case "readwrite", "sendreceive", "sendrecv":
02710| 		return "sendrecv"
02711| 	case "readonly", "sendonly":
02712| 		return "sendonly"
02713| 	case "receiveonly", "recvonly":
02714| 		return "recvonly"
02715| 	case "receiveencrypted", "recvenc", "receive-encrypted":
02716| 		return "recvenc"
02717| 	default:
02718| 		return ""
02719| 	}
02720| }

02722| func normalizeBEPMessageType(token string) string {
02723| 	token = strings.TrimSpace(token)
02724| 	if token == "" {
02725| 		return ""
02726| 	}
02727| 	token = strings.ReplaceAll(token, ".", "_")
02728| 	token = strings.ReplaceAll(token, "-", "_")
02729| 	reAcronymBoundary := regexp.MustCompile(`([A-Z]+)([A-Z][a-z])`)
02730| 	reWordBoundary := regexp.MustCompile(`([a-z0-9])([A-Z])`)
02731| 	token = reAcronymBoundary.ReplaceAllString(token, "${1}_${2}")
02732| 	token = reWordBoundary.ReplaceAllString(token, "${1}_${2}")
02733| 	token = strings.ToLower(token)
02734| 	token = strings.Trim(token, "_")
02735| 	for strings.Contains(token, "__") {
02736| 		token = strings.ReplaceAll(token, "__", "_")
02737| 	}
02738| 	return token
02739| }
02740| 
02741| func normalizeHTTPMethodToken(token string) string {
02742| 	token = strings.TrimSpace(token)
02743| 	if !strings.HasPrefix(token, "Method") {
02744| 		return strings.ToUpper(token)
02745| 	}
02746| 	token = strings.TrimPrefix(token, "Method")
02747| 	if token == "" {
02748| 		return ""
02749| 	}
02750| 	return strings.ToUpper(token)
02751| }

02753| func readRepoFile(relPath string) ([]byte, error) {
02754| 	relPath = filepath.Clean(relPath)
02755| 	candidatePrefixes := []string{
02756| 		".",
02757| 		"..",
02758| 		"../..",
02759| 	}
02760| 	var lastErr error
02761| 	for _, prefix := range candidatePrefixes {
02762| 		candidate := filepath.Join(prefix, relPath)
02763| 		bs, err := os.ReadFile(candidate)
02764| 		if err == nil {
02765| 			return bs, nil
02766| 		}
02767| 		if !errors.Is(err, fs.ErrNotExist) {
02768| 			lastErr = err
02769| 		} else if lastErr == nil {
02770| 			lastErr = err
02771| 		}
02772| 	}
02773| 
02774| 	wd, err := os.Getwd()
02775| 	if err == nil {
02776| 		dir := wd
02777| 		for depth := 0; depth < 12; depth++ {
02778| 			candidate := filepath.Join(dir, relPath)
02779| 			bs, readErr := os.ReadFile(candidate)
02780| 			if readErr == nil {
02781| 				return bs, nil
02782| 			}
02783| 			if !errors.Is(readErr, fs.ErrNotExist) {
02784| 				lastErr = readErr
02785| 			} else if lastErr == nil {
02786| 				lastErr = readErr
02787| 			}
02788| 
02789| 			parent := filepath.Dir(dir)
02790| 			if parent == dir {
02791| 				break
02792| 			}
02793| 			dir = parent
02794| 		}
02795| 	}
02796| 
02797| 	if lastErr == nil {
02798| 		lastErr = fs.ErrNotExist
02799| 	}
02800| 	return nil, fmt.Errorf("open %s: %w", relPath, lastErr)
02801| }

02803| func validateExceptions(report *guardrailReport, ex exceptionsFile, mode string) {
02804| 	now := time.Now().UTC()
02805| 
02806| 	if (mode == "release" || mode == "replacement") && len(ex.Items) > 0 {
02807| 		report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
02808| 			Rule:    "release-exceptions",
02809| 			Path:    "parity/exceptions.json",
02810| 			Message: fmt.Sprintf("%s mode requires parity/exceptions.json to be empty", mode),
02811| 		})
02812| 	}
02813| 
02814| 	for i, item := range ex.Items {
02815| 		loc := fmt.Sprintf("parity/exceptions.json:item[%d]", i)
02816| 		if _, ok := allowedExceptionRules[item.Rule]; !ok {
02817| 			report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
02818| 				Rule:    "exception-invalid-rule",
02819| 				Path:    loc,
02820| 				Message: fmt.Sprintf("unsupported exception rule %q", item.Rule),
02821| 			})
02822| 		}
02823| 		if strings.TrimSpace(item.Reason) == "" {
02824| 			report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
02825| 				Rule:    "exception-metadata",
02826| 				Path:    loc,
02827| 				Message: "exception missing reason",
02828| 			})
02829| 		}
02830| 		if strings.TrimSpace(item.ApprovedBy) == "" {
02831| 			report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
02832| 				Rule:    "exception-metadata",
02833| 				Path:    loc,
02834| 				Message: "exception missing approved_by",
02835| 			})
02836| 		}
02837| 		if strings.TrimSpace(item.DecisionRecord) == "" {
02838| 			report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
02839| 				Rule:    "exception-metadata",
02840| 				Path:    loc,
02841| 				Message: "exception missing decision_record",
02842| 			})
02843| 		}
02844| 		if item.ExpiresAt != "" {
02845| 			expires, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, item.ExpiresAt)
02846| 			if err != nil {
02847| 				report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
02848| 					Rule:    "exception-expiry",
02849| 					Path:    loc,
02850| 					Message: fmt.Sprintf("invalid expires_at %q", item.ExpiresAt),
02851| 				})
02852| 			} else if now.After(expires) {
02853| 				report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
02854| 					Rule:    "exception-expiry",
02855| 					Path:    loc,
02856| 					Message: "exception is expired",
02857| 				})
02858| 			}
02859| 		}
02860| 	}
02861| }

02863| type rustSurfacePrefix struct {
02864| 	Prefix   string
02865| 	IsPublic bool
02866| }
02867| 
02868| func scanRustSurfaceSymbols() (map[string]bool, map[string]bool) {
02869| 	symbols := make(map[string]bool)
02870| 	publicSymbols := make(map[string]bool)
02871| 	fnPattern := regexp.MustCompile(`\bfn\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\s*\(`)
02872| 	prefixes := []rustSurfacePrefix{
02873| 		{Prefix: "pub fn ", IsPublic: true},
02874| 		{Prefix: "pub struct ", IsPublic: true},
02875| 		{Prefix: "pub enum ", IsPublic: true},
02876| 		{Prefix: "pub trait ", IsPublic: true},
02877| 		{Prefix: "pub const ", IsPublic: true},
02878| 		{Prefix: "pub static ", IsPublic: true},
02879| 		{Prefix: "pub(crate) fn ", IsPublic: false},
02880| 		{Prefix: "pub(crate) struct ", IsPublic: false},
02881| 		{Prefix: "pub(crate) enum ", IsPublic: false},
02882| 		{Prefix: "pub(crate) trait ", IsPublic: false},
02883| 		{Prefix: "pub(crate) const ", IsPublic: false},
02884| 		{Prefix: "pub(crate) static ", IsPublic: false},
02885| 	}
02886| 
02887| 	for _, root := range parityCriticalRoots {
02888| 		info, err := os.Stat(root)
02889| 		if err != nil || !info.IsDir() {
02890| 			continue
02891| 		}
02892| 		_ = filepath.WalkDir(root, func(path string, d fs.DirEntry, err error) error {
02893| 			if err != nil || d.IsDir() || !strings.HasSuffix(path, ".rs") {
02894| 				return nil
02895| 			}
02896| 			bs, readErr := os.ReadFile(path)
02897| 			if readErr != nil {
02898| 				return nil
02899| 			}
02900| 			for _, line := range strings.Split(string(bs), "\n") {
02901| 				line = strings.TrimSpace(line)
02902| 				if match := fnPattern.FindStringSubmatch(line); len(match) == 2 {
02903| 					symbols[match[1]] = true
02904| 				}
02905| 				for _, prefix := range prefixes {
02906| 					if !strings.HasPrefix(line, prefix.Prefix) {
02907| 						continue
02908| 					}
02909| 					name := strings.Fields(strings.TrimPrefix(line, prefix.Prefix))
02910| 					if len(name) == 0 {
02911| 						continue
02912| 					}
02913| 					sym := name[0]
02914| 					if idx := strings.Index(sym, "("); idx >= 0 {
02915| 						sym = sym[:idx]
02916| 					}
02917| 					if idx := strings.Index(sym, "<"); idx >= 0 {
02918| 						sym = sym[:idx]
02919| 					}
02920| 					sym = strings.TrimSuffix(sym, ":")
02921| 					sym = strings.TrimSuffix(sym, "{")
02922| 					sym = strings.TrimSuffix(sym, ";")
02923| 					sym = strings.TrimSpace(sym)
02924| 					if sym == "" {
02925| 						continue
02926| 					}
02927| 					symbols[sym] = true
02928| 					if prefix.IsPublic {
02929| 						publicSymbols[sym] = true
02930| 					}
02931| 					break
02932| 				}
02933| 			}
02934| 			return nil
02935| 		})
02936| 	}
02937| 	return symbols, publicSymbols
02938| }

02940| func scanTODOFixme(report *guardrailReport, exceptions []guardException) {
02941| 	for _, root := range parityCriticalRoots {
02942| 		info, err := os.Stat(root)
02943| 		if err != nil || !info.IsDir() {
02944| 			continue
02945| 		}
02946| 		_ = filepath.WalkDir(root, func(path string, d fs.DirEntry, err error) error {
02947| 			if err != nil || d.IsDir() || !strings.HasSuffix(path, ".rs") {
02948| 				return nil
02949| 			}
02950| 			bs, readErr := os.ReadFile(path)
02951| 			if readErr != nil {
02952| 				return nil
02953| 			}
02954| 			lines := strings.Split(string(bs), "\n")
02955| 			for i, line := range lines {
02956| 				if !strings.Contains(line, "TODO") && !strings.Contains(line, "FIXME") {
02957| 					continue
02958| 				}
02959| 				if strings.Contains(line, "PARITY-EXCEPTION:") {
02960| 					token := strings.TrimSpace(line[strings.Index(line, "PARITY-EXCEPTION:")+len("PARITY-EXCEPTION:"):])
02961| 					if token != "" && exceptionAllowed(exceptions, "todo-fixme", token, filepath.ToSlash(path)) {
02962| 						continue
02963| 					}
02964| 				}
02965| 				if !exceptionAllowed(exceptions, "todo-fixme", "", filepath.ToSlash(path)) {
02966| 					report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
02967| 						Rule:    "todo-fixme",
02968| 						Path:    fmt.Sprintf("%s:%d", filepath.ToSlash(path), i+1),
02969| 						Message: "TODO/FIXME found in parity-critical path without approved exception",
02970| 					})
02971| 				}
02972| 			}
02973| 			return nil
02974| 		})
02975| 	}
02976| }

02978| func enforceDiffReports(report *guardrailReport, mode string) {
02979| 	latestPath := "parity/diff-reports/latest.json"
02980| 	latest := differentialReport{}
02981| 	if err := readJSON(latestPath, &latest); err != nil {
02982| 		report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
02983| 			Rule:    "differential-report",
02984| 			Path:    latestPath,
02985| 			Message: "missing or invalid differential report",
02986| 		})
02987| 	} else {
02988| 		validateReportFreshness(report, latestPath, "differential report", latest.GeneratedAt, maxDiffReportAge)
02989| 		validateDifferentialEvidenceInputs(report, latestPath, latest)
02990| 		if strings.TrimSpace(latest.ProducedBy) != "parity-harness" {
02991| 			report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
02992| 				Rule:    "differential-report",
02993| 				Path:    latestPath,
02994| 				Message: "differential report must be produced by parity-harness",
02995| 			})
02996| 		}
02997| 		if !latest.Match {
02998| 			report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
02999| 				Rule:    "differential-mismatch",
03000| 				Path:    latestPath,
03001| 				Message: "differential report indicates mismatch",
03002| 			})
03003| 		}
03004| 		for _, mm := range latest.Mismatches {
03005| 			sev := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(mm.Severity))
03006| 			if mm.Open && (sev == "p0" || sev == "p1") {
03007| 				report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
03008| 					Rule:    "differential-open-critical",
03009| 					ID:      mm.ID,
03010| 					Path:    latestPath,
03011| 					Message: fmt.Sprintf("open %s mismatch: %s", strings.ToUpper(mm.Severity), mm.Message),
03012| 				})
03013| 			}
03014| 		}
03015| 	}
03016| 
03017| 	testPath := "parity/diff-reports/test-status.json"
03018| 	test := testStatusReport{}
03019| 	if err := readJSON(testPath, &test); err != nil {
03020| 		report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
03021| 			Rule:    "memory-cap-tests",
03022| 			Path:    testPath,
03023| 			Message: "missing or invalid memory-cap test status report",
03024| 		})
03025| 	} else {
03026| 		validateReportFreshness(report, testPath, "memory-cap status report", test.GeneratedAt, maxDiffReportAge)
03027| 		validateMemoryCapStatus(report, testPath, test)
03028| 	}
03029| 
03030| 	if mode != "release" && mode != "replacement" {
03031| 		return
03032| 	}
03033| 
03034| 	interopPath := "parity/diff-reports/interop.json"
03035| 	interop := interopReport{}
03036| 	if err := readJSON(interopPath, &interop); err != nil || !interop.Pass {
03037| 		report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
03038| 			Rule:    "release-interop",
03039| 			Path:    interopPath,
03040| 			Message: "release mode requires interop pass",
03041| 		})
03042| 	} else {
03043| 		validateReportFreshness(report, interopPath, "interop report", interop.GeneratedAt, maxDiffReportAge)
03044| 	}
03045| 
03046| 	durPath := "parity/diff-reports/durability.json"
03047| 	dur := durabilityReport{}
03048| 	if err := readJSON(durPath, &dur); err != nil {
03049| 		report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
03050| 			Rule:    "release-durability",
03051| 			Path:    durPath,
03052| 			Message: "missing or invalid durability report",
03053| 		})
03054| 	} else {
03055| 		validateReportFreshness(report, durPath, "durability report", dur.GeneratedAt, maxDiffReportAge)
03056| 		if strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(dur.Durability)) != "passed" {
03057| 			report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
03058| 				Rule:    "release-durability",
03059| 				Path:    durPath,
03060| 				Message: fmt.Sprintf("durability=%s", dur.Durability),
03061| 			})
03062| 		}
03063| 		if strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(dur.CrashRecovery)) != "passed" {
03064| 			report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
03065| 				Rule:    "release-durability",
03066| 				Path:    durPath,
03067| 				Message: fmt.Sprintf("crash_recovery=%s", dur.CrashRecovery),
03068| 			})
03069| 		}
03070| 	}
03071| }

03073| func validateMemoryCapStatus(report *guardrailReport, path string, test testStatusReport) {

03075| 	if status == "" || status == "skipped" || (status != "pass" && status != "passed") {

03094| 		})
03095| 	}

03098| func validateReportFreshness(report *guardrailReport, path, label, generatedAt string, maxAge time.Duration) {
03099| 	ts := strings.TrimSpace(generatedAt)
03100| 	if ts == "" {
03101| 		report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
03102| 			Rule:    "differential-report-stale",
03103| 			Path:    path,
03104| 			Message: fmt.Sprintf("%s is missing generated_at", label),
03105| 		})
03106| 		return
03107| 	}
03108| 	parsed, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, ts)
03109| 	if err != nil {
03110| 		report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
03111| 			Rule:    "differential-report-stale",
03112| 			Path:    path,
03113| 			Message: fmt.Sprintf("%s has invalid generated_at %q", label, generatedAt),
03114| 		})
03115| 		return
03116| 	}
03117| 	age := time.Since(parsed)
03118| 	if age < 0 {
03119| 		age = -age
03120| 	}
03121| 	if age > maxAge {
03122| 		report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
03123| 			Rule:    "differential-report-stale",
03124| 			Path:    path,
03125| 			Message: fmt.Sprintf("%s is stale (%s old, max %s)", label, age.Round(time.Minute), maxAge),
03126| 		})
03127| 	}
03128| }

03130| func validateDifferentialEvidenceInputs(report *guardrailReport, path string, latest differentialReport) {
03131| 	roots := latest.InputRoots
03132| 	if len(roots) == 0 {
03133| 		roots = parityEvidenceInputRoots
03134| 	}
03135| 	if strings.TrimSpace(latest.InputsDigest) == "" {
03136| 		report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
03137| 			Rule:    "differential-evidence-stale",
03138| 			Path:    path,
03139| 			Message: "differential report is missing inputs_digest (rerun parity harness)",
03140| 		})
03141| 		return
03142| 	}
03143| 	currentDigest, err := computeInputDigest(roots)
03144| 	if err != nil {
03145| 		report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
03146| 			Rule:    "differential-evidence-stale",
03147| 			Path:    path,
03148| 			Message: fmt.Sprintf("failed to recompute parity evidence digest: %v", err),
03149| 		})
03150| 		return
03151| 	}
03152| 	if !strings.EqualFold(strings.TrimSpace(currentDigest), strings.TrimSpace(latest.InputsDigest)) {
03153| 		report.Failures = append(report.Failures, reportFailure{
03154| 			Rule:    "differential-evidence-stale",
03155| 			Path:    path,
03156| 			Message: "differential evidence is outdated vs current sources (rerun parity harness)",
03157| 		})
03158| 	}
03159| }

03161| func computeInputDigest(roots []string) (string, error) {
03162| 	files, err := collectInputDigestFiles(roots)
03163| 	if err != nil {
03164| 		return "", err
03165| 	}
03166| 	if len(files) == 0 {
03167| 		return "", errors.New("no input files found for parity evidence digest")
03168| 	}
03169| 
03170| 	h := sha256.New()
03171| 	for _, path := range files {
03172| 		bs, err := os.ReadFile(path)
03173| 		if err != nil {
03174| 			return "", err
03175| 		}
03176| 		normalized := filepath.ToSlash(path)
03177| 		if _, err := h.Write([]byte(normalized)); err != nil {
03178| 			return "", err
03179| 		}
03180| 		if _, err := h.Write([]byte{0}); err != nil {
03181| 			return "", err
03182| 		}
03183| 		if _, err := h.Write(bs); err != nil {
03184| 			return "", err
03185| 		}
03186| 		if _, err := h.Write([]byte{0}); err != nil {
03187| 			return "", err
03188| 		}
03189| 	}
03190| 	return hex.EncodeToString(h.Sum(nil)), nil
03191| }
03192| 
03193| func collectInputDigestFiles(roots []string) ([]string, error) {
03194| 	out := make([]string, 0)
03195| 	seen := make(map[string]struct{})
03196| 	for _, root := range roots {
03197| 		root = filepath.Clean(strings.TrimSpace(root))
03198| 		if root == "" {
03199| 			continue
03200| 		}
03201| 		info, err := os.Stat(root)
03202| 		if err != nil {
03203| 			return nil, err
03204| 		}
03205| 		if !info.IsDir() {
03206| 			normalized := filepath.ToSlash(root)
03207| 			if _, ok := seen[normalized]; !ok {
03208| 				seen[normalized] = struct{}{}

Now let me handle fix #3 (daemon-api-surface as external soak repetition candidate). I need to check if the `required_external_soak_scenarios` validation in `parity.go` covers it. Let me look at the `validateReplacementExternalSoak` function — it reads from `required_external_soak_scenarios`. The task says "daemon-api-surface scenario can be treated as external soak repetition candidate." I need to ensure the `externalSoakScenarioID` list or similar recognizes `daemon-api-surface`.

Looking at the code: `daemonAPISurfaceScenarioID = "daemon-api-surface"` is already accepted in `main()`. The issue is that the `runScenario` function's switch doesn't include it — it's handled separately in `main()`. For it to be a repetition candidate, the existing external soak validation pipeline should also accept it. Let me check the `validateReplacementExternalSoak` function — it already reads arbitrary scenario IDs from the gates file. So the fix is to ensure `daemon-api-surface` is recognized in `runScenario` as well for repetition:

part.text:
All done. Here's the summary:

## Modified files

1. **`script/parity_external_soak.go`** - 6 changes:
   - `requiredAPIResponseKeysForProbe("GET /rest/system/status")` - changed from `["myID","uptimeS"]` to Go truth keys: `["myID","uptime","alloc","sys","goroutines","startTime","pathSeparator","urVersionMax","connectionServiceStatus","discoveryStatus","guiAddressUsed"]`
   - `requiredAPIResponseKeysForProbe("GET /rest/db/completion")` - changed from `["folder","device","completionPct","needBytes"]` to Go truth keys: `["completion","globalBytes","needBytes","globalItems","needItems","needDeletes","sequence","remoteState"]`
   - `requiredAPIResponseKeysForProbe("GET /rest/db/browse")` - changed from `["0"]` to `[]` (array-shaped in Go, no object keys)
   - `requiredAPIResponseKeysForProbe("POST /rest/db/scan")` - changed from `["ok"]` to `[]` (Go returns empty 200)
   - `requiredAPIResponseKeysForProbe("GET /rest/cluster/pending/devices")` and `pending/folders` - changed from `["count"]` to `[]` (Go returns map, no count wrapper)
   - `probeDaemonAPIEndpoints` - added enforcement: required keys are now checked against present keys; probe fails with a descriptive error if any are missing
   - `runScenario` - added `daemonAPISurfaceScenarioID` as a valid switch case, delegating to `runScenarioDaemonAPISurface` to make it a repetition candidate

2. **`script/parity.go`** - 3 changes in `replacementAPIRequiredResponseKeys()`:
   - `GET /rest/system/status` - aligned with Go truth fields
   - `GET /rest/db/browse` - changed from `["folder","limit","items"]` to `[]`
   - `GET /rest/db/completion` - aligned with Go truth keys
   - `POST /rest/db/scan` - changed from `["folder","sequence","state","stats"]` to `[]`

| `go test ./script/parity_external_soak.go ./script/parity_external_soak_fuzz_test.go` | **ok** (0.546s) |

| `go test ./script/parity_harness.go ./script/parity_harness_test.go ./script/parity_harness_fuzz_test.go` | **ok** (0.382s) |
